metadata.description: Token-efficient workflow stack for Claude Code. Hub + MCP plugins + bundled skill plugins.

plugins.name: stack
plugins.description: Entry point. Bundles routing, setup, maintenance docs as skills. Install first.

plugins.name: git-fs
plugins.description: Virtual filesystem over a bare git object store. Each session works on agent/<id> branch; every edit is a commit; Stop hook merges to main and materializes to disk.

plugins.name: vicky
plugins.description: Demand-driven knowledge base. Auto-enriches answers when gaps detected. Drives Obsidian + Dataview for live KB views.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Library/SDK/framework docs, versioned and current (Context7 MCP).

plugins.name: pdf-reader
plugins.description: MCP server providing tools to read PDF files (text, images, metadata, page ranges, batch). Wraps @sylphx/pdf-reader-mcp.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts ~75% of tokens while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

plugins.name: context-mode
plugins.description: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, automatic state restore across compactions.
